prompt: We've finished the architecture session for GlobalBank. I have s2-02, s2-03 and s2-04 ready and want to estimate the delivery effort. Where do we start?
assertions: Response contains the AIOps TEP Session Phase A opening header (e.g. 'AIOps Task, Estimation & Planning â€” Session 3 of 3' or equivalent)
Response includes a table or list showing the four phases (assumptions, task inventory, sizing, estimation roll-up) and their output files (s3-01 through s3-03)
Response references the required Session 2 inputs (s2-02 UC selection, s2-03 design, s2-04 plan)
Response presents or offers to confirm the T-shirt conversion table (XS=1-2, S=3-5, M=6-10, L=11-20, XL=21-40 person-days) and allows override
Response does NOT produce person-day estimates before building the task inventory and assumptions
